mapper.select: SELECT ifnull(COUNT(*), '0') as 'stationPartitionNum' from (SELECT DISTINCT a.id FROM pr_heat_station_partition a LEFT JOIN pr_data_grant b on b.user_id = #{userId} LEFT JOIN pr_heat_station_org c on c.org_id = b.org_id and a.station_id = c.station_id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.is_deleted = '0' and a.station_id = c.station_id) b
